title: 54Pcs Superhero Party Tableware Decorations for Boys Birthday,Superhero Avengers Cartoon Decorations Table Cloth,7inch Paper Plates,Banner,Paper Napkins for Avengers Theme Table Party Favor
features: 54 Pcs Party Tableware Set: The includes Superhero Avengers 16pcs 7 in paper Plates, 16pcs paper cups,20pcs of napkins,1pcs 137*274cm tablecloth, and 1pcs " Happy Birthday" Superhero Avengers Theme Party banner which is enough to meet the needs of 16 people. It is an ideal choice for Kids Birthday Party Decorations

Quality materials: The plates and napkins are made of 100% food-grade environmentally friendly materials, BPA-free, non-toxic, biodegradable and recyclable. Warm tips: please do not microwave the plate, the cup is only used for cold drinks

Exquisite Design: Superhero Avengers Party Tableware Kits Decorations for Kidscutlery has exquisite and beautiful patterns, with Decorations Superhero Avengers elements added to plates and napkins. It is cute, brightly colored, full of vitality and eye-catching, allowing your friends and family to enjoy a fun party

Wide application: The disposable party tableware set is suitable for indoor and outdoor use, very suitable for Boy's Birthdays, Baby Shower and Marvel Avengers Party prince gatherings; With this Marvel Avengers Party set of plates and utensils, you will have a pleasant day, as they can hold food as well as decorations at your party!

Save your time and enjoy the party: Disposable paper plates, napkins are recycled paper products,After the party, you can simply roll up all the garbage with a tablecloth and throw it into the trash can together. saving time and effortlessly. Allows you to better enjoy gatherings with family and friends.
